title: G5: Justify level-of-analysis alignment and aggregation of shared constructs

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body: Team efficacy and learning behavior are SHARED, team-level constructs aggregated from individual responses. The model must justify aggregation and team-level alignment of all three constructs: within-team agreement (r_wg; James-Demaree-Wolf 1984), and reliability of aggregation (ICC(1), ICC(2); Bliese 2000), under a referent-shift consensus composition model. Untreated level-of-analysis mismatch (ecological/atomistic fallacy) would invalidate the mediation model. Also require sufficient between-team variance for the a-, b-, c'-paths to be estimable.
